mapper.sql: select id, code, name, alias, province, city, district, address, latitude, longitude, level, theme_tags, season_tags, best_months, open_hours, duration_hours, ticket_price, transportation, crowd_level, suitable_for, summary, highlights, travel_tips, image_url, status, source, create_time, update_time from northeast_attraction
mapper.insert: insert into northeast_attraction (code, name, alias, province, city, district, address, latitude, longitude, level, theme_tags, season_tags, best_months, open_hours, duration_hours, ticket_price, transportation, crowd_level, suitable_for, summary, highlights, travel_tips, image_url, status, source) values (#{code}, #{name}, #{alias}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{level}, #{themeTags}, #{seasonTags}, #{bestMonths}, #{openHours}, #{durationHours}, #{ticketPrice}, #{transportation}, #{crowdLevel}, #{suitableFor}, #{summary}, #{highlights}, #{travelTips}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{source})
mapper.delete: delete from northeast_attraction where id in #{id}
